name: Cranberry Sauce (Any Size)
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare pans with cooking spray and flour. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. In another mixing bowl, combine egg whites, sugar, cranberry sauce, milk, and applesauce. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened. Pour batter into prepared pans. Bake for 55 minutes, depending on pan size.
